name: @mis-plugins/adopter-evidence-packager
description: 26번째 도구 — Type 2 외부 adopter corroboration 캡처 (plan-type2-external-adoption.md EXT-CAPTURE 해소). .ai-context/state.json + scope manifest + findings + traceability-matrix → 익명화 corroboration 합성 → adopter-corroboration.schema 검증 → .ai-context/output/adopter-corroboration.json.
